F1

"Let's ride."

7.8
2025MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

Tags
